raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":1.0,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.2","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"The delegation explicitly asks to check whether the argument is internally consistent across premises, method descriptions, deployment claims, and conclusions.","RX.1":"Any projection of consistency checking should preserve uncertainty about what can be inferred from the artifact alone.","RX.2":"The task centrally requires avoiding acceptance of conclusions that exceed or contradict the stated premises.","RX.3":"The delegation is narrowly limited to logical consistency and should not expand into rewriting, novelty review, or citation audit.","RX.4":"Logical inconsistencies in deployment or evaluation claims could mislead downstream users about system reliability or applicability.","RX.5":"Consistency judgments should remain traceable to specific statements in the provided artifact."}}

rationale.R1.2: The delegation explicitly asks to check whether the argument is internally consistent across premises, method descriptions, deployment claims, and conclusions.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of consistency checking should preserve uncertainty about what can be inferred from the artifact alone.
rationale.RX.2: The task centrally requires avoiding acceptance of conclusions that exceed or contradict the stated premises.
rationale.RX.3: The delegation is narrowly limited to logical consistency and should not expand into rewriting, novelty review, or citation audit.
rationale.RX.4: Logical inconsistencies in deployment or evaluation claims could mislead downstream users about system reliability or applicability.
rationale.RX.5: Consistency judgments should remain traceable to specific statements in the provided artifact.
